plugins.name: spanner-security
plugins.description: Spanner PD's secure-by-default engineering standard + a pre-commit/push secret gate — GitHub, Supabase, and Cloudflare rules plus the three-layer compliance framework. Applies automatically when building, committing, or pushing anything touching code, data, auth, or deployment.

plugins.name: spanner-toolkit
plugins.description: Spanner's working skill set for Claude Code — project setup, SpannerOS schema migrations and CRUD scaffolding, Torque product-UI language, design-review loop, operating model, internal-portal deploy, domain/SSL/DNS, weekly digest, matrix task sync, and meeting notes (Granola/Zoom/Otter → Notion, with optional screenshot enrichment). Brings terminal Claude Code to parity with the org skill library.
